---
name: coi-performance-optimization
description: Core Web Vitals budgeting, code splitting, bundle analysis, and lazy-loading strategy for sustained perf.
version: 1.0.0

---

# Purpose

Set, measure, and protect Core Web Vitals (LCP, INP, CLS) with code-splitting, bundle budgets, lazy loading, and runtime profiling. Single-responsibility: performance budget + tooling.

# Inputs

- React architecture from `@.cursor/skills/coi-react-architecture/SKILL.md`.
- Cache + CDN strategies from `@.cursor/skills/coi-cache-strategies/SKILL.md` and `@.cursor/skills/coi-cdn-optimization/SKILL.md`.
- DB performance from `@.cursor/skills/coi-database-optimization/SKILL.md`.
- DevOps pipeline from `@.cursor/skills/coi-devops-pipeline/SKILL.md`.

# Step-by-Step Workflow

1. Define budgets: LCP < 2.5s (p75), INP < 200ms (p75), CLS < 0.1 (p75), JS < 170KB compressed on entry route.
2. Measure: Lighthouse CI on PR, web-vitals RUM in prod, k6/Lighthouse trends weekly.
3. Code splitting: route-level + component-level dynamic import; preload critical chunks; tree-shake.
4. Bundle analysis: `next build` analyzer, `source-map-explorer`, fail CI when budget exceeds; ban heavy lib without justification.
5. Lazy load below-the-fold: images (`loading="lazy"`), iframes, non-critical scripts (defer/async + module).
6. Runtime: avoid layout thrash, debounce expensive handlers, batch DOM reads/writes, use `requestIdleCallback` for non-critical.
7. Server: streaming rendering (Suspense), edge functions for static-fast paths, prefetch nav targets.

# Validation & Metrics

- Lighthouse CI gate fails PRs that breach budgets.
- p75 web-vitals tracked per route in RUM.
- Bundle size delta surfaced per PR.
- INP measured (not just FID legacy).
- 404s, redirects, and image weight regressions flagged.

# Output Format

- `docs/core/required/sdd/PERF_BUDGET.md` (route × metric × threshold).
- `lighthouserc.json` config.
- Bundle-budget config (Next.js, Webpack, or framework-equivalent).
- Lazy-load + preload checklist.
- Weekly perf trend report.

# Integration Hooks

- `/SCAN perf` runs the audit suite.
- `/FIX` consumes regressions.
- Pairs with `@.cursor/skills/coi-react-architecture/SKILL.md`, `@.cursor/skills/coi-cache-strategies/SKILL.md`, `@.cursor/skills/coi-cdn-optimization/SKILL.md`, `@.cursor/skills/coi-monitoring-observability/SKILL.md`, `@.cursor/skills/coi-database-optimization/SKILL.md`.
- Enforces `[.cursor/rules/coia-design-gates-pro.mdc](.cursor/rules/coia-design-gates-pro.mdc)` Gate 6.

# Anti-Patterns

- Tracking only synthetic metrics; ignoring RUM.
- Adding `loading="lazy"` to LCP image (hurts LCP).
- Importing heavy libs at app entry instead of route-scope.
- Polyfills loaded for modern browsers without conditional.
- Treating performance as a one-time hardening task.

# External Reference

- web.dev/vitals (https://web.dev/vitals/) — current.
- Lighthouse CI (https://github.com/GoogleChrome/lighthouse-ci) — current.
- web-vitals JS (https://github.com/GoogleChrome/web-vitals) — current.
- Next.js performance docs (https://nextjs.org/docs).
- Closest skills.sh/official analog: performance-optimization / web-vitals.
